<a id="index--apache-commons-compress"></a>

# Apache Commons Compress™

The Apache Commons Compress library defines an API for
working with ar, cpio, Unix dump, tar, zip, gzip, XZ, Pack200, bzip2, 7z, arj, LZMA, snappy, DEFLATE, lz4, Brotli, Zstandard, DEFLATE64 and Z files.

The code in this component has many origins:

- The bzip2, tar and zip support came from Avalon's
  Excalibur, but originally from Ant, as far as life in
  Apache goes. The tar package is originally Tim Endres'
  public domain package. The bzip2 package is based on
  the work done by Keiron Liddle as well as Julian Seward's
  [libbzip2](http://www.bzip.org/index.html).
  It has migrated
  via: Ant -> Avalon-Excalibur -> Commons-IO
  -> Commons-Compress.
- The cpio package has been contributed by Michael Kuss
  and
  the [jRPM](http://jrpm.sourceforge.net/)
  project.
- The pack200 code has originally been part of the now
  retired [Apache
  Harmony™](https://harmony.apache.org/) project.

<a id="index--status"></a>

# Status

The current release requires Java 8 or above.

For a list of changes see the [Changes Report](#changes).

<a id="index--documentation"></a>

# Documentation

The compress component is split into *compressors* and
*archivers*. While *compressors*
(un)compress streams that usually store a single
entry, *archivers* deal with archives that contain
structured content represented
by `ArchiveEntry` instances which in turn
usually correspond to single files or directories.

Currently the bzip2, Pack200, XZ, gzip, LZMA, brotli, Zstandard and Z formats are
supported as compressors where gzip support is mostly provided by
the `java.util.zip` package of the Java
class library. XZ and LZMA support is provided by the public
domain [XZ for
Java](https://tukaani.org/xz/java.html) library. Brotli support is provided by the MIT
licensed [Google
Brotli decoder](https://github.com/google/brotli). Zstandard support is provided by the BSD
licensed [Zstd-jni](https://github.com/luben/zstd-jni).
As of Commons Compress 1.21 support for the DEFLATE64, Z and Brotli
formats is read-only.

The ar, arj, cpio, dump, tar, 7z and zip formats are supported as
archivers where the [zip](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-compress/zip.html)
implementation provides capabilities that go beyond the
features found in java.util.zip. As of Commons Compress
1.21 support for the dump and arj formats is
read-only - 7z can read most compressed and encrypted
archives but only write unencrypted ones. LZMA(2) support
in 7z requires [XZ for
Java](https://tukaani.org/xz/java.html) as well.

The compress component provides abstract base classes for
compressors and archivers together with factories that can
be used to choose implementations by algorithm name. In
the case of input streams the factories can also be used
to guess the format and provide the matching
implementation.

- The [user guide](#examples) contains
  more detailed information and some examples.
- The [known limitations and
  problems](#limitations) page lists the currently known problems
  grouped by the format they apply to.
- The [Javadoc](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-compress/apidocs/index.html) of the latest GIT
- The [GIT
  repository](https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=commons-compress.git) can be browsed.

<a id="changes--apache-commons-compress-release-notes"></a>

# Apache Commons Compress Release Notes

<a id="changes--release-history"></a>

## Release History

| Version | Date | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [1.28.0](#changes--a1.28.0) | 2025-07-26 | This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required. |
| [1.27.1](#changes--a1.27.1) | 2024-08-16 | This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required. |
| [1.27.0](#changes--a1.27.0) | 2024-08-03 | This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required. |
| [1.26.2](#changes--a1.26.2) | 2024-05-18 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.26.1](#changes--a1.26.1) | 2024-03-05 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.26.0](#changes--a1.26.0) | 2024-02-17 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.25.0](#changes--a1.25.0) | 2023-11-12 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.24.0](#changes--a1.24.0) | 2023-09-04 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.23.0](#changes--a1.23.0) | 2023-03-18 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.22](#changes--a1.22) | 2022-11-01 | Minor feature and maintenance release. |
| [1.21](#changes--a1.21) | 2021-07-12 | Release 1.21 (Java 8 or above) ---------------------------------------- SevenZFileOptions has a new setting that needs to be enabled explicity if SevenZFile should try to recover broken archives - a feature introduced with Commons Compress 1.19. This is a breaking change if you relied on the recovery attempt. |
| [1.20](#changes--a1.20) | 2020-02-08 | Release 1.20 (Java 7 or above) |
| [1.19](#changes--a1.19) | 2019-08-27 | Release 1.19 ---------------------------------------- ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipFile will no longer throw an exception if an extra field generally understood by Commons Compress is malformed but rather turn them into UnrecognizedExtraField instances. You can influence the way extra fields are parsed in more detail by using the new getExtraFields(ExtraFieldParsingBehavior) method of ZipArchiveEntry now. Some of the ZIP extra fields related to strong encryption will now throw ZipExceptions rather than ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsExceptions in certain cases when used directly. There is no practical difference when they are read via ZipArchiveInputStream or ZipFile. |
| [1.18](#changes--a1.18) | 2018-08-16 | Release 1.18 ---------------------------------------- This release changes the OSGi Manifest entry Bundle-SymbolicName from org.apache.commons.compress to org.apache.commons.commons-compress. |
| [1.17](#changes--a1.17) | 2018-06-03 | Release 1.17 |
| [1.16.1](#changes--a1.16.1) | 2018-02-10 | Release 1.16.1 |
| [1.16](#changes--a1.16) | 2018-02-05 | Release 1.16 |
| [1.15](#changes--a1.15) | 2017-10-17 | Release 1.15 ---------------------------------------- TarArchiveOutputStream now ensures record size is 512 and block size is a multiple of 512 as any other value would create invalid tar archives. This may break compatibility for code that deliberately wanted to create such files. |
| [1.14](#changes--a1.14) | 2017-05-14 | Release 1.14 |
| [1.13](#changes--a1.13) | 2016-12-29 | Release 1.13 - API compatible to 1.12 but requires Java 7 at runtime. |
| [1.12](#changes--a1.12) | 2016-06-21 | Release 1.12 - API compatible to 1.11 but requires Java 6 at runtime. ------------ Release 1.12 changes the behavior of BZip2CompressorOutputStream's finalize method so that it no longer invokes finish. This is going to break code that relied on the finalizer to clean up an unfinished stream. The code will need to be changed to call finish or close itself. Note that a finalizer is not guaranteed to run, so the feature was not 100% effective in any case. |
| [1.11](#changes--a1.11) | 2016-04-06 | Release 1.11 |
| [1.10](#changes--a1.10) | 2015-08-18 | Release 1.10 ------------ Release 1.10 moves the former org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.z.\_internal\_ package which breaks backwards compatibility for code which used the old package. This also changes the superclass of ZCompressorInputStream. |
| [1.9](#changes--a1.9) | 2014-10-09 | Release 1.9 |
| [1.8.1](#changes--a1.8.1) | 2014-05-14 | Release 1.8.1 |
| [1.8](#changes--a1.8) | 2014-03-12 | Release 1.8 |
| [1.7](#changes--a1.7) | 2014-01-20 | Release 1.7 |
| [1.6](#changes--a1.6) | 2013-10-26 | Release 1.6 |
| [1.5](#changes--a1.5) | 2013-03-14 | Release 1.5 |
| [1.4.1](#changes--a1.4.1) | 2012-05-23 | Release 1.4.1 |
| [1.4](#changes--a1.4) | 2012-04-11 | Release 1.4 |
| [1.3](#changes--a1.3) | 2011-11-01 | Release 1.3 - API compatible to 1.2 but requires Java5 at runtime |
| [1.2](#changes--a1.2) | 2011-07-31 | Release 1.2 - a bugfix release, the last release expected to be compatible with Java 1.4 |
| [1.1](#changes--a1.1) | 2010-08-13 | Release 1.1 |
| [1.0](#changes--a1.0) | 2009-05-21 | First Public Release |

| Remove | GzipCompressorOutputStream no longer percent-endcodes in US-ASCII a file name or comment that the Charset in GzipParameters.setFileNameCharset(Charset) cannot encode. Fixes [COMPRESS-638](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-638). Thanks to vincexjl, Gary Gregory, Piotr P. Karwasz. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Remove | Remove ZstdCompressorOutputStream.toString(), it was misleading by returning the delegate's toString(). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

| Fix | Fix PMD UselessOverridingMethod in unpack200.bytecode.LineNumberTableAttribute. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.26.2-2024-05-18"></a>

## Release 1.26.2 – 2024-05-18

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Deprecate org.apache.commons.compress.utils.CharsetNames in favor or java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets. Fixes [COMPRESS-665](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-665). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Elliotte Rusty Harold. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Validate TarArchiveEntry checksums #500. Fixes [COMPRESS-674](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-674). Thanks to Gren Elliot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | OSGi: Remove unresolvable dependencies in manifest and make the commons-io packages really optional. Fixes [COMPRESS-676](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-676). Thanks to Martin Schneider. | [ecki](#team--ecki) |
| Fix | Avoid possible NullPointerException in org.apache.commons.compress.utils.Sets.newHashSet(E...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ZipArchiveOutputStream.setEncoding(String) with a null value throws IllegalArgumentException. Fixes [COMPRESS-677](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-677). Thanks to Jeffrey Adamson, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.Archive.unpack() should not close streams it does not own (when constructed from Archive(InputStream, JarOutputStream)). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ArArchiveOutputStream doesn't pad correctly when a file name length is odd and greater than 16 (padding missing). Thanks to takaaki nakama, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ArArchiveOutputStream should check that a file name length greater than 16 fits in a header. Fixes [COMPRESS-678](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-678). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ArArchiveOutputStream implicit narrowing conversion in compound assignment. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Regression on parallel processing of 7zip files. Fixes [COMPRESS-679](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-679). Thanks to Mikaël MECHOULAM, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Regression in pack200's Archive class -- underlying InputStream is now closed. Fixes [COMPRESS-675](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-675). Thanks to Tim Allison, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Avoid NullPointerException in java.nio.channels.spi.AbstractInterruptibleChannel.close() when calling org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.FileRandomAccessOutputStream.close(). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix SpotBugs NP\_NULL\_PARAM\_DEREF in Sets.newHashSet(). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Private class' method PackingLogger.setVerbose(boolean) should be private. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 66 to 69 #495, #508. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump org.ow2.asm:asm from 9.6 to 9.7 #504. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.5.5-11 to 1.5.6-2 #510. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.15.1 to 2.16.1 #514. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump org.slf4j:slf4j-api from 2.0.12 to 2.0.13 #519. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.16.1 to 1.17.0. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.26.1-2024-03-05"></a>

## Release 1.26.1 – 2024-03-05

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | TarArchiveOutputStream should use Commons IO Charsets instead of Commons Codec Charsets. Fixes [COMPRESS-659](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-659). Thanks to David Handermann, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Add org.apache.commons.codec to OSGi imports #482. Fixes [COMPRESS-660](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-660). Thanks to 660, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Return null value from getNextEntry() for empty file #486. Fixes [COMPRESS-664](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-664). Thanks to Radek Kraus. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Remove unused variables in tests #487. Fixes [COMPRESS-664](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-664). Thanks to Elliotte Rusty Harold. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Multithreaded access to Tar archive throws java.util.zip.ZipException: Corrupt GZIP trailer. Fixes [COMPRESS-666](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-666). Thanks to Cosmin Carabet, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ArchiveStreamFactory.detect(InputStream) returns TAR for ICO file #386. Fixes [COMPRESS-644](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-644). Thanks to Tim Allison, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ArchiveInputStream markSupported should always return false. Fixes [COMPRESS-661](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-661). Thanks to Alexander Veit, Tilman Hausherr, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Remove | Remove out of date jar and scripts #483. Fixes [COMPRESS-662](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-662). Thanks to Christoph Loy, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

## Release 1.26.0 – 2024-02-17

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Check for invalid PAX values in TarArchiveEntry #438. Fixes [COMPRESS-632](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632). Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix for zero size headers in ArjInputStream #439. Fixes [COMPRESS-632](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632). Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fixes and tests for ArInputStream #440. Fixes [COMPRESS-632](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632). Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fixes for dump file parsing #442. Fixes [COMPRESS-632](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632). Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Improve CPIO exception detection and handling #441. Fixes [COMPRESS-632](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632). Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate SkipShieldingInputStream without replacement (no longer used). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse commons-codec, don't duplicate class PureJavaCrc32C (removed package-private class). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse commons-codec, don't duplicate class XXHash32 (deprecated class). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class Charsets (deprecated class). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class IOUtils (deprecated methods). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class BoundedInputStream (deprecated class). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class FileTimes (deprecated TimeUtils methods). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reuse Arrays.equals(byte[], byte[]) and deprecate ArchiveUtils.isEqual(byte[], byte[]). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Add a null-check for the class loader of OsgiUtils #451. Thanks to alumi, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Add a null-check in Pack200.newInstance(String, String). Thanks to alumi, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate ChecksumCalculatingInputStream in favor of java.util.zip.CheckedInputStream. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate CRC32VerifyingInputStream.CRC32VerifyingInputStream(InputStream, long, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | FramedSnappyCompressorOutputStream produces incorrect output when writing a large buffer #457. Fixes [COMPRESS-655](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-655). Thanks to cpreisler, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix TAR directory entries being misinterpreted as files #460. Fixes [COMPRESS-657](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-657). Thanks to Sebastian Schuberth, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate unused method FileNameUtils.getBaseName(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate unused method FileNameUtils.getExtension(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ArchiveInputStream.BoundedInputStream.read() incorrectly adds 1 for EOF to the bytes read count. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate IOUtils.read(File, byte[]). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate IOUtils.copyRange(InputStream, long, OutputStream, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ZipArchiveOutputStream multi archive updates metadata in incorrect file #455. Fixes [COMPRESS-653](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-653). Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate ByteUtils.InputStreamByteSupplier. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate ByteUtils.fromLittleEndian(InputStream, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate ByteUtils.toLittleEndian(DataOutput, long, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reduce duplication by having ArchiveInputStream extend FilterInputStream. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Support preamble garbage in ZipArchiveInputStream #471. Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix formatting the lowest expressable DOS time #472. Fixes [COMPRESS-658](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-658). Thanks to Arnout Engelen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Drop reflection from ExtraFieldUtils static initialization #480. Thanks to Romain Manni-Bucau, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Preserve exception causation in ExtraFieldUtils.register(Class). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | New runtime dependencies on commons-codec, commons-lang3 and commons-io. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add and use ZipFile.builder(), ZipFile.Builder, and deprecate constructors. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add and use SevenZFile.builder(), SevenZFile.Builder, and deprecate constructors. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add and use ArchiveInputStream.getCharset(). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add and use ArchiveEntry.resolveIn(Path). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add Maven property project.build.outputTimestamp for build reproducibility. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons-lang3 from 3.13.0 to 3.14.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump com.github.marschall:memoryfilesystem from 2.6.1 to 2.8.0 #444, #458. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

| Update | Bump com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.5.5-10 to 1.5.5-11 #448. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

| Add | Add generics to ArchiveStreamProvider and friends. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add a generic type parameter to ArchiveOutputStream and avoid unchecked/unconfirmed type casts in subclasses. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

| Fix | Precompile regular expression in ArArchiveInputStream.isBSDLongName(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Precompile regular expression in ArArchiveInputStream.isGNULongName(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Precompile regular expression in TarArchiveEntry.parseInstantFromDecimalSeconds(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Precompile regular expression in ChangeSet.addDeletion(Change). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Improve performance in BlockLZ4CompressorOutputStream. Fixes [COMPRESS-649](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-649). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Null-guard Lister.main(String[]) for programmatic invocation. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | NPE in pack200.NewAttributeBands.Reference.addAttributeToBand(NewAttribute, InputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Incorrect lazy initialization and update of static field in pack200.CodecEncoding.getSpecifier(Codec, Codec). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Incorrect string comparison in unpack200.AttributeLayout.numBackwardsCallables(). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Inefficient use of keySet iterator instead of entrySet iterator in pack200.PackingOptions.addOrUpdateAttributeActions(List, Map, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Package private class pack200.IcBands.IcTuple should be a static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Private class ZipFile.BoundedFileChannelInputStream should be a static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Refactor internal SevenZ AES256SHA256Decoder InputStream into a named static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Refactor internal SevenZ AES256SHA256Decoder OutputStream into a named static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use the root Locale for string conversion of command line options in org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.sevenz.CLI. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Calling PackingUtils.config(PackingOptions) with null now closes the internal FileHandler. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | LZ4 compressor throws IndexOutOfBoundsException. Fixes [COMPRESS-650](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-650). Thanks to Chad Preisler. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | LZWInputStream.initializeTables(int) should throw IllegalArgumentException instead of ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. Fixes [COMPRESS-632](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632). Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Throw IOException instead of ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when reading Zip with data descriptor entries. Fixes [COMPRESS-647](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-647). Thanks to Robin Schimpf, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

| Add | Make ZipArchiveEntry.getLocalHeaderOffset() public. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | Use try-with-resources in ArchiveStreamFactory #391. Thanks to Daniele Galloppo. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Javadoc and code comments: Sanitize grammar issues and typos #393. Thanks to Martin Wiesner. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Remove redundant (null) initializations #394. Thanks to Martin Wiesner. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | [StepSecurity] ci: Harden GitHub Actions #396. Thanks to step-security-bot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump zstd-jni from 1.5.4-2 to 1.5.5-5 #377, #383, #388, #390, #400. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump memoryfilesystem from 2.5.0 to 2.6.1 #381, #385, #387. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump commons-parent from 56 to 61 #384. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.13.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons-lang3 from 3.12.0 to 3.13.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump org.slf4j:slf4j-api from 2.0.7 to 2.0.8. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.23.0-2023-03-18"></a>

## Release 1.23.0 – 2023-03-18

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Implicit narrowing conversion in compound assignment. Thanks to CodeQL, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Avoid NPE in FileNameUtils.getBaseName(Path) for paths with zero elements like root paths. Thanks to CodeQL, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Avoid NPE in FileNameUtils.getExtension(Path) for paths with zero elements like root paths. Thanks to CodeQL, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | LZMA2Decoder.decode() looses original exception. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Extract conditions and avoid duplicate code. #297. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Remove duplicate conditions. Use switch instead. #298. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Replace JUnit 3 and 4 with JUnit 5 #344, #346. Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Make 'ZipFile.offsetComparator' static #353. Thanks to Glavo. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | The GzipCompressorOutputStream#writeHeader() uses ISO\_8859\_1 to write the file name and comment. If the strings contains non-ISO\_8859\_1 characters, unknown characters are displayed after decompression. Use percent encoding for non ISO\_8859\_1 characters. Fixes [COMPRESS-638](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-638). Thanks to Radar wen, Gary Gregory, Michael Osipov. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Port some code from IO to NIO APIs. Thanks to Jonathan Leitschuh, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | pack200: Fix FileBands misusing InputStream#read(byte[]) #360. Thanks to Una, Gary Gregory, Jochen Wiedmann, quaternary, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Add TarArchiveEntry.getLinkFlag() #365. Fixes [COMPRESS-641](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-641). Thanks to XenoAmess, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Integer overflow ArithmeticException in TarArchiveOutputStream #368. Fixes [COMPRESS-642](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-642). Thanks to Anton Klarén, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.ZipFile.finalize() should not write to std err. Fixes [COMPRESS-502](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-502). Thanks to Dominik Stadler, Stefan Bodewig, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Use FileTime for time fields in SevenZipArchiveEntry #256. Fixes [COMPRESS-614](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-614). Thanks to Andre Brait, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Fix calculation the offset of the first ZIP central directory entry #334. Fixes [COMPRESS-621](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-621). Thanks to Glavo. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add encryption support for SevenZ #332. Fixes [COMPRESS-633](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-633). Thanks to Daniel Santos, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Support for extra time data in Zip archives #345. Fixes [COMPRESS-613](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-613). Thanks to Andre Brait, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.DefaultBackingStoreSupplier to write to a custom folder instead of the default temporary folder. Fixes [COMPRESS-621](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-621). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add capability to configure Deflater strategy in GzipCompressorOutputStream: GzipParameters.setDeflateStrategy(int). Fixes [COMPRESS-600](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-600). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Pascal Davoust. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Remove | Remove BZip2CompressorOutputStream.finalize() which only wrote to std err. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump mockito.version from 4.8.0 to 4.11.0 #328, #331, #340, #348. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump pmd from 6.50.0 to 6.53.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump memoryfilesystem from 2.3.0 to 2.5.0 #330, #359. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump slf4j-api from 2.0.3 to 2.0.7 #329, #333, #341, #371. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump japicmp from 0.16.0 to 0.17.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons-parent from 54 to 56 #339, #349. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump zstd-jni from 1.5.2-5 to 1.5.4-2 #362, #364. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump asm from 9.4 to 9.5 #376. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |

<a id="changes--release-1.22-2022-11-01"></a>

## Release 1.22 – 2022-11-01

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Fix some compiler warnings in pack200 packages. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Close File input stream after unpacking in Pack200UnpackerAdapter.unpack(File, JarOutputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Pack200UnpackerAdapter.unpack(InputStream, JarOutputStream) should not close its given input stream. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix minor problem in examples. Fixes [COMPRESS-596](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-596). Thanks to Tamas Mucs. | [Peter Lee](#team--peter-lee) |
| Fix | Add a limit to the copy buffer in IOUtils.readRange() to avoid reading more from a channel than asked for. Github Pull Request #214. Fixes [COMPRESS-584](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-584). Thanks to Matthijs Laan, Peter Lee. | [matthijsln](#team--matthijsln) |
| Fix | Documentation nits #217. Thanks to Helder Magalhães, Gary Gregory, PeterAlfredLee. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Replace wrapper Collections.sort is with an instance method directly. #245. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Replace manual comparisons with Comparator.comparingInt() #244. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Replace manual copy of array contents with System.arraycopy() #246. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix thread safety issues when encoding 7z password #248. Thanks to Glavo, Bruno P. Kinoshita, PeterAlfredLee, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | bzip2: calculate median-of-3 on unsigned values #242. Thanks to Peter Dettman. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use Math.min and Math.max calculations. #247. Thanks to Arturo Bernal, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Expander should be able to work if an entry's name is "./". Fixes [COMPRESS-603](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-603). Thanks to Matt Sicker. | [Peter Lee](#team--peter-lee) |
| Fix | Ensure compatibility with Java 8 #252. Fixes [COMPRESS-604](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-604). Thanks to Andre Brait. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use StringBuilder instead of StringBuffer. #284. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Inline variable. Remove redundant local variable. #283. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use compare method #285. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Remove Unnecessary interface modifiers #281. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Avoid use C-style array declaration. #282. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ChecksumVerifyingInputStream.read() does not always validate checksum at end-of-stream. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix TarFileTest #289. Thanks to Matt Juntunen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Update Wikipedia link in TarUtils.java:627. Fixes [COMPRESS-625](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-625). Thanks to MrBump, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | OutOfMemoryError on malformed pack200 input (attributes). Fixes [COMPRESS-626](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-626). Thanks to Andrii Hudz, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | OutOfMemoryError on malformed pack200 input (org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.NewAttributeBands.readNextUnionCase). Fixes [COMPRESS-628](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-628). Thanks to Andrii Hudz, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | OutOfMemoryError on malformed unpack200 input (org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.NewAttributeBands.readNextUnionCase). Fixes [COMPRESS-628](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-628). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Some input streams are not closed in org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.PackingUtils. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Pack200 causes a 'archive.3E' error if it’s not in the system class loader. Fixes [COMPRESS-627](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-627). Thanks to anatawa12, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Migrate ZIP package to use NIO #236. Fixes [COMPRESS-602](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-602). Thanks to Postelnicu George, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add APK file extension constants: ArchiveStreamFactory.APK, APKM, APKS, XAPK. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | ArchiveStreamFactory.createArchiveInputStream(String, InputStream, String) supports the "APK" format (it's a JAR). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Expander example now has NIO Path versions of IO File APIs. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Improve TAR support for file times #254. Fixes [COMPRESS-612](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-612). Thanks to Andre Brait, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add SevenZArchiveEntry.setContentMethods(SevenZMethodConfiguration...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump actions/cache from 2.1.6 to 3.0.10 #230, #257, #305, #320. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump actions/checkout from 2.3.4 to 3.1.0 #226, #227, #251, #300, #321. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump actions/setup-java from 2 to 3.5.1 #278. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump github/codeql-action from 1 to 2 #287. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump mockito-core from 3.11.1 to 4.6.1 #209, #224, #231, #235, #243, #253, #286, #294. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump org.apache.felix.framework from 7.0.0 to 7.0.1 #208. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump memoryfilesystem from 2.1.0 to 2.3.0 #212, #237. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump zstd-jni from 1.5.0-2 to 1.5.2-5 #215, #233, #238, #240, #250, #291, #326. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump Pack200 packages from ASM 3.2 to 9.2 #216. Breaks binary compatibility in the internals of the pack200 implementation: - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.Segment - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.SegmentMethodVisitor - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.SegmentAnnotationVisitor - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.SegmentFieldVisitor. Fixes [COMPRESS-582](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-582). Thanks to Alex Landau, Stephan, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump asm from 9.2 to 9.4 #279, #322. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Bump maven-javadoc-plugin from 3.3.0 to 3.4.1 #221, #249, #288, #308. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.21-2021-07-12"></a>

## Release 1.21 – 2021-07-12

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Update | Made sure ZstdCompressorOutputStream no longer used deprecated ZstOutputStream constructors. Github Pull Request #94. Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee. | - |
| Update | Make compression level of ParallelScatterZipCreator configurable via a new constructor. Fixes [COMPRESS-504](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-504). | - |
| Fix | Fix bugs in random access of 7z. Problems may happen in a mixture use of random access and sequential access of 7z. Github Pull Request #95. Fixes [COMPRESS-505](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-505). | - |
| Fix | Fix bugs in random access of 7z. Exceptions are thrown when reading the first entry multiple times by random access. Fixes [COMPRESS-510](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-510). | - |
| Fix | Add '/' to directories with long name in tar. This is to resolve the ambiguous behavior of the TarArchiveEntry.getName() method between directory with short name and long name. Fixes [COMPRESS-509](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-509). Thanks to Petr Vasak. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Removed the PowerMock dependency. Fixes [COMPRESS-520](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-520). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | - |
| Fix | Added improved checks to detect corrupted bzip2 streams and throw the expected IOException rather than obscure RuntimeExceptions. See also COMPRESS-519. Fixes [COMPRESS-516](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-516). | - |
| Fix | Improved parsing of X5455\_ExtendedTimestamp ZIP extra field. Fixes [COMPRESS-517](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-517). | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipFile will now throw an IOException rather than a RuntimeException if the zip64 extra field of an entry could not be parsed. Fixes [COMPRESS-518](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-518). | - |
| Fix | Improved detection of corrupt ZIP archives in ZipArchiveInputStream. Fixes [COMPRESS-523](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-523). | - |
| Fix | Added improved checks to detect corrupted deflate64 streams and throw the expected IOException rather than obscure RuntimeExceptions. See also COMPRESS-522, COMPRESS-525, COMPRESS-526, and COMPRESS-527. Fixes [COMPRESS-521](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-521). | - |
| Fix | Add the archive name in the exception in the constructor of ZipFile to make it a more specific exception. Github Pull Request #102. Fixes [COMPRESS-515](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-515). Thanks to ian-lavallee. | - |
| Fix | Throw IOException when it encounters a non-number while parsing pax header. Fixes [COMPRESS-530](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-530). | - |
| Fix | Throw IOException when a tar archive contains a PAX header without any normal entry following it. Fixes [COMPRESS-531](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-531). | - |
| Fix | Added improved checks to detect corrupted IMPLODED streams and throw the expected IOException rather than obscure RuntimeExceptions. Fixes [COMPRESS-532](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-532). | - |
| Fix | Throw expected IOException instead of NumberFormatException if it encounters non-numbers when parsing pax headers for tarball. Throw IllegalArgumentException instead of RuntimeExceptions if the file name is longer than 100 bytes with the longFileMode of LONGFILE\_ERROR, and address this in java docs. Throw IllegalArgumentException instead of RuntimeExceptions if the any of the numeric values of an entry exceeds the limits of a traditional tar header while bigNumberMode is BIGNUMBER\_ERROR, and address this in java docs. Fixes [COMPRESS-529](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-529). | - |
| Update | Made an inner class static Github Pull Request #107. Fixes [COMPRESS-536](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-536). Thanks to Jin Xu. | - |
| Update | added an early exit to a loop in BZip2CompressorOutputStream Github Pull Request #106. Fixes [COMPRESS-535](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-535). Thanks to Jin Xu. | - |
| Update | Update the class of variable file in TarArchiveEntry from java.io.File to java.nio.file.Path. Corresponding constructors and methods are also modified/added. NOTE: The userName, groupName, userID and groupID will also be set if they are available. The userName and groupName was not set previously, and the previous value of UserID:GroupID was 0:0 by default. Please note this may cause a reproducibility problem. Github Pull Request #97. Fixes [COMPRESS-404](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-404). Thanks to theobisproject. | - |
| Update | Reuse the record buffer in TarArchiveInputStream. Fixes [COMPRESS-539](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-539). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | - |
| Update | Add SevenZOutputFile.write(InputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add SevenZOutputFile.write(Path, OpenOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add SevenZOutputFile.createArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add ArArchiveOutputStream.createArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add ArArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add ctor CpioArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add ctor CpioArchiveEntry(short, Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add CpioArchiveEntry.setTime(FileTime). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add TarArchiveOutputStream.createArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add ctor TarArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add IOUtils.EMPTY\_LINK\_OPTIONS. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Add Path support to ZipArchiveOutputStream #123. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix for test fails on Windows. The tests are failing because the default charset is not UTF-8. Fixes [COMPRESS-543](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-543). Thanks to wulf2333. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | TarArchiveInputStream can not detect a truncated tar in skip() and skipRecordPadding(). Fixes [COMPRESS-544](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-544). Thanks to Aditya Prasad. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Make the memory allocation in SevenZFile.readFilesInfo a lazy allocation to avoid OOM when dealing some giant 7z archives. Github Pull Request #120. Also added sanity checks before even trying to parse an archive and made SevenZFileOptions' maxMemorySizeInKb apply to the stored metadata for an archive. And further added an option that needs to be enabled in order to make SevenZFile try to recover a broken archive. This is a backwards incompatible change. Fixes [COMPRESS-542](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-542). Thanks to theobisproject. | [theobisproject](#team--theobisproject) |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream should throw an exception if a corrputed zip64 extra field is met. Fixes [COMPRESS-546](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-546). Thanks to Maksim Zuev. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Add a new maven profile in pom.xml for JDK14+ to ignore the failing tests about Pack200. This has later been superseeded by adding the Apache Harmony classes for Pack200 support. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Throw an IOException when reading the ZIP extra field if the length is too short. Fixes [COMPRESS-548](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-548). Thanks to Maksim Zuev. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Throw an declared IOException if a null entry is met when reading a global pax header instead of a runtime NPE. Fixes [COMPRESS-554](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-554). Thanks to Maksim Zuev. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | ZIP extraction could lead to ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsExceptions rather than the expected IOException. Fixes [COMPRESS-545](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-545). Thanks to Maksim Zuev. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Add asserts for Arrays.copyOf in X0017\_StrongEncryptionHeader. Fixes [COMPRESS-547](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-547). Thanks to Maksim Zuev. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Add | Add writePreamble to ZipArchiveInputStream. This method could write raw data to ZIP archive before any entry was written to the ZIP archive. For most of the time, this is used to create self-extracting ZIP. Github Pull Request #127. Fixes [COMPRESS-550](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-550). Thanks to Scott Frederick. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Fix for the CFH signature detect in ZipArchiveInputStream. The problem could be reproduced by a ZIP archive with Data Descriptor and STORED, and without the Data Descriptor signature. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | The length validation in TarArchiveInputStream.parsePaxHeaders should also consider the headers with length smaller than 1 and ignore these headers. Fixes [COMPRESS-553](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-553). Thanks to Maksim Zuev. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Fix accidentally added '/' to file names. This problem is caused by the incomplete fix of COMPRESS-509. Github Pull Request #151. Fixes [COMPRESS-558](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-558). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | [Robin Schimpf](#team--robin-schimpf) |
| Fix | As sparse entries can be successfully parsed now, TarArchiveInputStream.canReadEntryData should return true if the entry is a sparse entry. Github Pull Request #153. Fixes [COMPRESS-560](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-560). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | [Robin Schimpf](#team--robin-schimpf) |
| Fix | SparseFilesTest#testExtractPaxGNU should be skipped if the version of GNU tar binary is 1.28. Github Pull Request #152. Fixes [COMPRESS-559](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-559). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | [Robin Schimpf](#team--robin-schimpf) |
| Update | Some minor improvements. Github Pull Request #157. Fixes [COMPRESS-561](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-561). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [Arturo Bernal](#team--arturo-bernal) |
| Add | Added support for random access to the TAR packages. Github Pull Request #113. Fixes [COMPRESS-540](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-540). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | [Robin Schimpf](#team--robin-schimpf) |
| Add | Added support for BufferPool in ZstdCompressorInputStream. Github Pull Request #165. Fixes [COMPRESS-565](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-565). Thanks to Michael L Heuer. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Removed an empty loop that was just warming the planet for certain ZIP archives. Github Pull Request #172. Thanks to Fabian Meumertzheim. | - |
| Fix | Made some of the stream classes used internally throw IOExceptions on illegal arguments rather than RuntimeExceptions to make it more likely that corrupt archives cause expected checked exceptions rather than RuntimException for various formats. Fixes a specific case for ZIP but affects other formats as well. Fixes [COMPRESS-567](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-567). | - |
| Add | Commons Compress cannot be built with JDK14 due to Pack200 removal. Add Pack200 implementation from Apache Harmony. Fixes [COMPRESS-507](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-507). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Apache Harmony. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Simplify Assertions #205. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update from Java 7 to 8. | - |
| Update | Update GitHub actions/checkout from v1 to v2.3.4, #114, #124, #139, #150. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update actions/setup-java from v1.4.0 to v2, #125, #133, #141. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.4.4-7 to 1.5.0-2, #118, #159, #173, #174, #203. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update tests slf4j-api from 1.7.26 to 1.7.30 #117. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update maven-pmd-plugin from 3.12.0 to 3.14.0, #115, #154. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update maven-bundle-plugin from 3.5.1 to 5.1.2 #116, #180. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump memoryfilesystem from 1.3.0 to 2.1.0 #131. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump actions/cache from v2 to v2.1.6, #164, #200. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump junit from 4.13 to 4.13.2, #143, #167. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump mockito-core from 1.10.19 to 3.11.1, #161, #170, #204. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons.jacoco.version from 0.8.5 to 0.8.7 (Java 16 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump org.apache.felix:org.apache.felix.framework from 6.0.3 to 7.0.0 (Java 16 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons.japicmp.version from 0.14.3 to 0.15.3 (Java 16 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons.javadoc.version from 3.2.0 to 3.3.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Checked the sizes read for archive entries and reject archives as broken with negative entry sizes. Fixes an infinite loop in the new TarFile class but affects several formats. Fixes [COMPRESS-569](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-569). | - |
| Fix | OSGi detection was broken and so we always cached whether XZ/brotli/zstd/LZMA have been available even in OSGi environments. Fixes [COMPRESS-552](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-552). | - |
| Fix | SevenZFile.getEntries now return a copy of entries. Fixes [COMPRESS-571](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-571). | - |
| Update | Update com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.4.8-7 to 1.4.9-1 #176. Thanks to Dependabot. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Fix | Handling of sparse tar entries has been hardened to ensure bad inputs cause expected IOExceptions rather than RuntimeExceptions. Fixes [COMPRESS-575](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-575). | - |
| Update | Update org.tukaani:xz from 1.8 to 1.9 | - |
| Add | Add a new AlwaysWithCompatibility in Zip64Mode, this is a compromise for some libraries including 7z and Expand-Archive Powershell utility(and likely Excel). And we will encode both the LFH offset and Disk Number Start in the ZIP64 Extended Information Extra Field - even if only the disk number needs to be encoded. Github Pull Request #169. Fixes [COMPRESS-565](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-565). Thanks to Evgenii Bovykin. | [PeterLee](#team--peterlee) |
| Update | Some minor improvements. Github Pull Request #193. Fixes [COMPRESS-577](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-577). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [Arturo Bernal](#team--arturo-bernal) |
| Update | Java8 improvements. Github Pull Request #194. Fixes [COMPRESS-578](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-578). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [Arturo Bernal](#team--arturo-bernal) |
| Update | Remove redundant local variable. Github Pull Request #195. Fixes [COMPRESS-579](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-579). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [Arturo Bernal](#team--arturo-bernal) |
| Update | Remove redundant operation Github Pull Request #196. Fixes [COMPRESS-580](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-580). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [Arturo Bernal](#team--arturo-bernal) |
| Add | gzip deflate buffer size is now configurable. Fixes [COMPRESS-566](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-566). Thanks to Brett Okken. | - |
| Fix | The parser for GNU sparse tar headers could throw a NullPointerExcpetion rather than an IOException if the archive ended while more sparse headers were expected. | - |
| Update | Call enableRelaxedEndCondition() to enable decoding of 7z files containing LZMA streams with end marker. Github Pull Request #223. Fixes [COMPRESS-591](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-591). Thanks to Lasse Collin. | [Peter Lee](#team--peter-lee) |
| Fix | Use LinkedHashMap for fileMap in SevenZFile.readFilesInfo, as it will be read in specific order. Fixes [COMPRESS-592](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-592). Thanks to Roland Kreuzer. | [Peter Lee](#team--peter-lee) |

<a id="changes--release-1.20-2020-02-08"></a>

## Release 1.20 – 2020-02-08

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Update | Update optional library com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.4.0-1 to 1.4.4-7. Fixes [COMPRESS-493](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-493). | - |
| Update | Update tests from org.apache.felix:org.apache.felix.framework 6.0.2 to 6.0.3. | - |
| Fix | SevenZFile could throw NullPointerException rather than IOException for certain archives. In addition it now handles certain empty archives more gracefully. Fixes [COMPRESS-492](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-492). | - |
| Fix | Deflate64CompressorInputStream.read would return 0 for some inputs in violation of the InputStream.read contract. Fixes [COMPRESS-491](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-491). | - |
| Remove | Removed the extraction code from the example CLI class inside of the SevenZ package. Not only is it superseeded by the examples package, its implementation was vulnerable to the ZipSlip attack. Fixes [COMPRESS-495](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-495). | - |
| Update | SevenZFile can now recover from a certain corruption that seems to happen occasionally when split archives are created. Fixes [COMPRESS-497](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-497). Thanks to Stefan Schlott. | - |
| Update | Added random access support to SevenZFile. Fixes [COMPRESS-342](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-342). Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee. | - |
| Update | Added support for split ZIP archives. Fixes [COMPRESS-477](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-477). Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee. | - |
| Update | Added support for reading sparse entries to the TAR package. Fixes [COMPRESS-124](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-124). Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee. | - |
| Fix | SeekableInMemoryByteChannel's truncate didn't set position according to the spec in an edge case. Fixes [COMPRESS-499](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-499). | - |
| Fix | BZip2CompressorInputStream now incorporates a similar patch as the one that fixed CVE-2019-12900 in libbzip2. Commons Compress has not been vulnerable to this CVE as it would have rejected a file with too many selectors. With this patch Commons Compress will be able to read certain archives that would have caused errors in Compress 1.19. Thanks to Joseph Allemandou. | - |
| Update | Update JUnit from 4.12 to 4.13. | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.19-2019-08-27"></a>

## Release 1.19 – 2019-08-27

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream could forget the compression level has changed under certain circumstances. | - |
| Add | It is now possible to skip parsing of local file headers when using ZipFile which may speed up reading the archive at the cost of potentially missing important information. See the javadocs of the ZipFile class for details. Fixes [COMPRESS-466](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-466). | - |
| Add | TarArchiveInputStream has a new constructor-arg lenient that can be used to accept certain broken archives. Fixes [COMPRESS-469](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-469). | - |
| Fix | Fixed another potential resource leak in ParallelScatterZipCreator#writeTo. Fixes [COMPRESS-470](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-470). | - |
| Add | ArjArchiveEntry and SevenZArchiveEntry now implement hashCode and equals. Fixes [COMPRESS-475](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-475). | - |
| Fix | ArArchiveInputStream could think it had hit EOF prematurely. Github Pull Request #74. Thanks to Alex Bertram. | - |
| Update | SevenZFile now provides a way to cap memory consumption for LZMA(2) compressed content. Github Pull Request #76. Fixes [COMPRESS-481](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-481). Thanks to Robin Schimpf. | - |
| Update | The ARJ package has been updated to contain constants for more recent specifications. Fixes [COMPRESS-464](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-464). Thanks to Rostislav Krasny. | - |
| Update | Update optional library zstd-jni from 1.3.3-3 to 1.4.0-1. Fixes [COMPRESS-484](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-484). | - |
| Update | ParallelScatterZipCreator now writes the entries to the gathered output in the same order they have been added. Github Pull Requests #78 and #79. Fixes [COMPRESS-485](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-485). Thanks to Hervé Boutemy, Tibor Digana. | - |
| Fix | Throw IOException rather than RuntimeExceptions for certain malformed LZ4 or Snappy inputs. Fixes [COMPRESS-490](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-490). | - |
| Update | The Expander and Archive example classes can leak resources they have wrapped around passed in streams or channels. The methods consuming streams and channels have been adapted to give the calling code a chance to deal with those wrapper resources. Fixes [COMPRESS-486](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-486). | - |
| Update | ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipFile no longer assume Commons Compress would understand extra fields better than the writer of the archive and silently turn extra fields that Commons Compress should understand into UnrecognizedExtraFields if parsing said fields fails. It is now possible to take more control over the extra field parsing process with a new overload of ZipArchiveEntry#getExtraFields. Fixes [COMPRESS-479](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-479). | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream failed to read stored entries with a data descriptor if the data descriptor didn't use the signature invented by InfoZIP. Fixes [COMPRESS-482](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-482). | - |
| Update | ZipArchiveInputStream will now throw an exception if reading a stored entry with a data descriptor and the data descriptor doesn't match what it has actually read. The most common case for a situation like this is a stored ZIP archive inside of the archive ZipArchiveInputStream currently reads. In such a case ZipArchiveInputStream would happily extract the contained archive and stop once the central directory of the inner archive has been hit. This is a case where ZipArchiveInputStream simply can not be used and only ZipFile is able to read the archive. The only other explanation is a broken archive. So the exception prevents users from thinking they had successfully read the contents of the archive. Fixes [COMPRESS-483](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-483). | - |
| Add | Added a MultiReadOnlySeekableByteChannel class that can be used to concatenate the parts of a multi volume 7z archive so that SevenZFile can read them. Fixes [COMPRESS-231](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-231). Thanks to Tim Underwood. | - |
| Update | The 7zip tools provide a default name for archive entries without name; SevenZFile returns a null name for such entries. A new method getDefaultName has been added to derive the same name the 7zip tools would use and an option has been added that sets SevenZArchiveEntry's name to the default name if it is not contained inside the archive. Fixes [COMPRESS-478](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-478). | - |
| Fix | NioZipEncoding#encode could enter an infinite loop for certain inputs. | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.18-2018-08-16"></a>

## Release 1.18 – 2018-08-16

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | The example Expander class has been vulnerable to a path traversal in the edge case that happens when the target directory has a sibling directory and the name of the target directory is a prefix of the sibling directory's name. Thanks to DidierLoiseau. | - |
| Fix | Changed the OSGi Import-Package to also optionally import javax.crypto so encrypted archives can be read. Fixes [COMPRESS-456](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-456). | - |
| Fix | Changed various implementations of the close method to better ensure all held resources get closed even if exceptions are thrown during the closing the stream. Fixes [COMPRESS-457](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-457). | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream can now detect the APK Signing Block used in signed Android APK files and treats it as an "end of archive" marker. Fixes [COMPRESS-455](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-455). | - |
| Fix | The cpio streams didn't handle archives using a multi-byte encoding properly. Fixes [COMPRESS-459](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-459). Thanks to Jens Reimann. | - |
| Add | It is now possible to specify the arguments of zstd-jni's ZstdOutputStream constructors via Commons Compress as well. Fixes [COMPRESS-460](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-460). Thanks to Carmi Grushko. | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream#read would silently return -1 on a corrupted stored entry and even return > 0 after hitting the end of the archive. Fixes [COMPRESS-463](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-463). | - |
| Fix | ArArchiveInputStream#read would allow to read from the stream without opening an entry at all. Fixes [COMPRESS-462](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-462). | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.17-2018-06-03"></a>

## Release 1.17 – 2018-06-03

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Removed the objenesis dependency from the pom as it is not needed at all. | - |
| Fix | Fixed resource leak in ParallelScatterZipCreator#writeTo. Fixes [COMPRESS-446](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-446). | - |
| Update | Fixed some code examples. Github Pull Request #63. Thanks to Marchenko Sergey. | - |
| Fix | Certain errors when parsing ZIP extra fields in corrupt archives are now turned into ZipException, they used to manifest as ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException before. Fixes [COMPRESS-447](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-447). | - |
| Update | The streams returned by ZipFile and most other decompressing streams now provide information about the number of compressed and uncompressed bytes read so far. This may be used to detect a ZipBomb if the compression ratio exceeds a certain threshold, for example. For SevenZFile a new method returns the statistics for the current entry. Fixes [COMPRESS-445](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-445). Thanks to Andreas Beeker. | - |
| Add | Added a unit test that is supposed to fail if we break the OSGi manifest entries again. Fixes [COMPRESS-443](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-443). | - |
| Add | Add a new SkipShieldingInputStream class that can be used with streams that throw an IOException when skip is invoked. Fixes [COMPRESS-449](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-449). | - |
| Fix | IOUtils.copy now verifies the buffer size is bigger than 0. Fixes [COMPRESS-451](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-451). | - |
| Add | New constructors have been added to SevenZFile that accept char[]s rather than byte[]s in order to avoid a common error of using the wrong encoding when creating the byte[]. This change may break source compatibility for client code that uses one of the constructors expecting a password and passes in null as password. We recommend to change the code to use a constructor without password argument. Fixes [COMPRESS-452](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-452). | - |
| Update | Added a workaround for a bug in AdoptOpenJDK for S/390 to BZip2CompressorInputStream. Fixes [COMPRESS-453](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-453). | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream failed to read some files with stored entries using a data descriptor. Fixes [COMPRESS-454](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-454). | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.16.1-2018-02-10"></a>

## Release 1.16.1 – 2018-02-10

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Fixed the OSGi manifest entry for imports that has been broken in 1.16. Fixes [COMPRESS-442](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-442). | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.16-2018-02-05"></a>

## Release 1.16 – 2018-02-05

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Add read-only support for Zstandard compression based on the Zstd-jni project. Fixes [COMPRESS-423](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-423). Thanks to Andre F de Miranda. | - |
| Add | Added auto-detection for Zstandard compressed streams. Fixes [COMPRESS-425](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-425). | - |
| Fix | Synchronized iteration over a synchronizedList in ParallelScatterZipCreator. Fixes [COMPRESS-430](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-430). Thanks to Bruno P. Kinoshita. | - |
| Fix | ZipFile could get stuck in an infinite loop when parsing ZIP archives with certain strong encryption headers. Fixes [COMPRESS-432](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-432). | - |
| Update | Replaces instanceof checks with a type marker in LZ77 support code. Fixes [COMPRESS-435](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-435). Thanks to BELUGA BEHR. | - |
| Add | Added write-support for Zstandard compression. Fixes [COMPRESS-426](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-426). | - |
| Fix | Added improved checks to detect corrupted bzip2 streams and throw the expected IOException rather than obscure RuntimeExceptions. Fixes [COMPRESS-424](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-424). | - |
| Update | Updated XZ for Java dependency to 1.8 in order to pick up bug fix to LZMA2InputStream's available method. | - |
| Update | ZipArchiveEntry now exposes how the name or comment have been determined when the entry was read. Fixes [COMPRESS-429](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-429). Thanks to Damiano Albani. | - |
| Add | Added read-only DEFLATE64 support to ZIP archives and as stand-alone CompressorInputStream. Fixes [COMPRESS-380](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-380). Thanks to Christian Marquez Grabia. | - |
| Update | ZipFile.getInputStream will now always buffer the stream internally in order to improve read performance. Fixes [COMPRESS-438](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-438). | - |
| Update | Speed improvement for DEFLATE64 decompression. Fixes [COMPRESS-440](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-440). Thanks to Dawid Weiss. | - |
| Add | Added read-only DEFLATE64 support to 7z archives. Fixes [COMPRESS-437](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-437). | - |
| Update | Added a few extra sanity checks for the rarer compression methods used in ZIP archives. Fixes [COMPRESS-436](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-436). | - |
| Update | Simplified the special handling for the dummy byte required by zlib when using java.util.zip.Inflater. Fixes [COMPRESS-441](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-441). | - |
| Update | Various code cleanups. Github Pull Request #61. Thanks to Shahab Kondri. | - |
| Update | TarArchiveEntry's preserveLeadingSlashes constructor argument has been renamed and can now also be used to preserve the drive letter on Windows. | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.15-2017-10-17"></a>

## Release 1.15 – 2017-10-17

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Make sure "version needed to extract" in local file header and central directory of a ZIP archive agree with each other. Also ensure the version is set to 2.0 if DEFLATE is used. Fixes [COMPRESS-394](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-394). | - |
| Fix | Don't use a data descriptor in ZIP archives when copying a raw entry that already knows its size and CRC information. Fixes [COMPRESS-395](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-395). | - |
| Fix | Travis build redundantly repeats compilation and tests redundantly #43. Fixes [COMPRESS-413](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-413). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Add | Added magic MANIFEST entry Automatic-Module-Name so the module name will be org.apache.commons.compress when the jar is used as an automatic module in Java9. Fixes [COMPRESS-397](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-397). | - |
| Fix | The MANIFEST of 1.14 lacks an OSGi Import-Package for XZ for Java. Fixes [COMPRESS-396](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-396). | - |
| Fix | BUILDING.md now passes the RAT check. Fixes [COMPRESS-406](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-406). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Add | Added a new utility class FixedLengthBlockOutputStream that can be used to ensure writing always happens in blocks of a given size. Fixes [COMPRESS-405](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-405). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Fix | Made sure ChecksumCalculatingInputStream receives valid checksum and input stream instances via the constructor. Fixes [COMPRESS-412](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-412). Thanks to Michael Hausegger. | - |
| Fix | TarArchiveOutputStream now verifies the block and record sizes specified at construction time are compatible with the tar specification. In particular 512 is the only record size accepted and the block size must be a multiple of 512. At the same time the default block size in TarArchiveOutputStream has been changed from 10240 to 512 bytes. Fixes [COMPRESS-407](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-407). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Add | It is now possible to specify/read custom PAX headers when writing/reading tar archives. Fixes [COMPRESS-400](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-400). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Fix | Fixed class names of CpioArchiveEntry and CpioArchiveInputStream in various Javadocs. Fixes [COMPRESS-415](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-415). | - |
| Fix | The code of the extended timestamp ZIP extra field incorrectly assumed the time was stored as unsigned 32-bit int and thus created incorrect results for years after 2037. Fixes [COMPRESS-416](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-416). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Fix | Removed ZipEncoding code that became obsolete when we started to require Java 5 as baseline long ago. Fixes [COMPRESS-410](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-410). Thanks to Simon Spero. | - |
| Fix | The tar package will no longer try to parse the major and minor device numbers unless the entry represents a character or block special file. Fixes [COMPRESS-417](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-417). | - |
| Fix | When reading tar headers with name fields containing embedded NULs, the name will now be terminated at the first NUL byte. Fixes [COMPRESS-421](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-421). Thanks to Roel Spilker. | - |
| Fix | Simplified TarArchiveOutputStream by replacing the internal buffering with new class FixedLengthBlockOutputStream. Fixes [COMPRESS-409](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-409). | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.14-2017-05-14"></a>

## Release 1.14 – 2017-05-14

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | SnappyCompressorInputStream slides the window too early leading to ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsExceptions for some streams. Fixes [COMPRESS-378](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-378). | - |
| Add | Added write support for Snappy. Fixes [COMPRESS-246](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-246). | - |
| Update | The blocksize for FramedSnappyCompressorInputStream can now be configured as some IWA files seem to be using blocks larger than the default 32k. Fixes [COMPRESS-358](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-358). | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveEntry#isUnixSymlink now only returns true if the corresponding link flag is the only file-type flag set. Fixes [COMPRESS-379](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-379). Thanks to Guillaume Boué. | - |
| Add | Added support for LZ4 (block and frame format). Fixes [COMPRESS-271](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-271). | - |
| Update | BZip2CompressorInputstream now uses BitInputStream internally. Pull Request #13. Thanks to Thomas Meyer. | - |
| Fix | Fixed an integer overflow in CPIO's CRC calculation. Pull Request #17. Thanks to Daniel Collin. | - |
| Add | Add static detect(InputStream in) to CompressorStreamFactory and ArchiveStreamFactory. Fixes [COMPRESS-385](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-385). | - |
| Fix | Make unit tests work on Windows paths with spaces in their names. Fixes [COMPRESS-387](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-387). | - |
| Update | Improved performance for concurrent reads from ZipFile when reading from a file. Fixes [COMPRESS-388](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-388). Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky. | - |
| Add | Added a way to limit amount of memory ZCompressorStream may use. Fixes [COMPRESS-382](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-382). Thanks to Tim Allison. | - |
| Add | Added a way to limit amount of memory ZCompressorStream may use. Fixes [COMPRESS-386](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-386). Thanks to Tim Allison. | - |
| Add | Added a way to limit amount of memory LZMACompressorStream and XZCompressorInputStream may use. Fixes [COMPRESS-382](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-382). Thanks to Tim Allison. | - |
| Fix | Internal location pointer in ZipFile could get incremented even if nothing had been read. Fixes [COMPRESS-389](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-389). | - |
| Add | Add Brotli decoder based on the Google Brotli library. Fixes [COMPRESS-392](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-392). Thanks to Philippe Mouawad. | - |
| Add | ZipEntry now exposes its data offset. Fixes [COMPRESS-390](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-390). Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky. | - |
| Fix | LZMACompressorOutputStream#flush would throw an exception rather than be the NOP it promised to be. Fixes [COMPRESS-393](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-393). | - |
| Add | Using ZipArchiveEntry's setAlignment it is now possible to ensure the data offset of an entry starts at a file position that at word or page boundaries. A new extra field has been added for this purpose. Fixes [COMPRESS-391](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-391). Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky. | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.13-2016-12-29"></a>

## Release 1.13 – 2016-12-29

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Update | Update Java requirement from 6 to 7. Fixes [COMPRESS-360](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-360). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | BitInputStream could return bad results when overflowing internally - if two consecutive reads tried to read more than 64 bits. Fixes [COMPRESS-363](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-363). | - |
| Update | Clarified which TarArchiveEntry methods are useless for entries read from an archive. Fixes [COMPRESS-366](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-366). | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream.closeEntry does not properly advance to next entry if there are junk bytes at end of data section. Fixes [COMPRESS-364](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-364). Thanks to Mike Mole. | - |
| Add | SevenZFile, SevenZOutputFile, ZipFile and ZipArchiveOutputStream can now work on non-file resources if they can be accessed via SeekableByteChannel. Fixes [COMPRESS-327](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-327). | - |
| Add | Allow compressor extensions through a standard JRE ServiceLoader. Fixes [COMPRESS-368](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-368). | - |
| Add | Allow archive extensions through a standard JRE ServiceLoader. Fixes [COMPRESS-369](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-369). | - |
| Add | Add write support for the legacy LZMA format, this requires XZ for Java 1.6. Fixes [COMPRESS-373](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-373). | - |
| Add | Add write support for the legacy LZMA stream to 7z, this requires XZ for Java 1.6. Fixes [COMPRESS-374](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-374). | - |
| Add | Allow the clients of ParallelScatterZipCreator to provide ZipArchiveEntryRequestSupplier. Fixes [COMPRESS-375](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-375). Thanks to Plamen Totev. | - |
| Fix | ZipArchiveInputStream now throws an Exception if it encounters a broken ZIP archive rather than signaling end-of-archive. Fixes [COMPRESS-367](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-367). Thanks to Mike Mole. | - |
| Fix | ScatterZipOutputStream didn't close the StreamCompressor causing a potential resource leak. Fixes [COMPRESS-377](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-377). | - |
| Add | Add a version-independent link to the API docs of the latest release. Fixes [COMPRESS-372](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-372). | - |

<a id="changes--release-1.12-2016-06-21"></a>

## Release 1.12 – 2016-06-21

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
